finalStatus: LIVE — production verified. All fixes deployed to Render (commit 84dafab, deploy dep-d95omgltpsds73fqls70). Owner AI answers identity, ownership, investment, and general conversation questions. Public AI answers identity + general questions. Protection endpoints return 401 (not 500) for owner-token-only requests. No fake/demo/test data remains — 4 real members, 3 real JV deals, 2 real wallets.
noteOn401s: Endpoints returning 401 AUTH_REQUIRED are NOT broken — they require a Supabase bearer token (from owner sign-in), not just the x-ivx-owner-token header. This is the correct security behavior: the owner-token alone is for the AI chat path; admin/treasury/protection endpoints require a full Supabase session. The app passes the Supabase access_token after sign-in.
